title: LlmSessionSummaryEvent
description: Input for the LLM gateway plugin on_session_summary call. Chat Engine selects which messages to summarize and passes them as a flat list. During re-summarization, the previous summary message is included as the first element.

enabled_capabilities.description: Capability values active for this summarization

messages.description: Messages selected for summarization. During re-summarization, the first element is the previous summary message.
